calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
TENTATIVE RULING: Off calendar.
EXAMINER: AEYOUNG KIM

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Continued To Jun-16-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Continued To May-12-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together:
1) PCN-16-299926, Conservatorship of Akiko Spindle; and
2) PTR-21-304724, The Akiko Spindle Revocable Trust.

Appearances:
Dr. Johanna T. Gomez for conservator and trustee Caron Schmierer (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on 1) Status on Order to Close Conservatorship Due to the Death of the Conservatee; and 2) Status Hearing on Filing the Trustee's Account and Report.

The Court noted that no accountings had been filed. Dr. Gomez explained that additional time was needed to confirm the status of certain beneficiaries in Japan. The Court continued the matters to May 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together:
PCN-16-299926, Conservatorship of Akiko Spindle
PTR-21-304724, The Akiko Spindle Revocable Trust

Appearances:
Dr. Johanna T. Gomez for Caron Schmierer, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Bruce A. Feder, Court Appointed Counsel for Conservatee (via Zoom).

The court inquired if either party had additional points to add to the filings. Both counsel confirmed they had no further submissions or arguments. The court reminded counsel that verifications must identify the title of the pleading being verified to prevent delays in future proceedings.

Discussion was held regarding Joy Souply, a co-conservator of the person, who has not indicated interest in resigning but does not actively participate. Dr. Gomez indicated that there is no intent to petition the court for her removal. The court agreed to leave the matter as it stands.

There being no objections regarding the accountings, the court took the matter under submission with intent to accept (but not approve) the accountings and indicated that adjudgments to attorney's fees may be made upon further review.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Johanna Gomez, via Zoom, for and with Caron Schmierer, Trustee; Melanie Emmons, via Zoom, court appointed counsel for Conservatee.

Ms. Gomez reports that the accounting should be filed by next Monday, Aug-29-2022.

The matter is continued to Sep-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
